shelter_generate_events.label: Generate Recurring Events
shelter_generate_events.description: Create upcoming event instances from the program schedule configuration.

program.description: Program slug to generate events for. Omit to generate all.

weeks.description: Number of weeks ahead to generate.

shelter_list_programs.label: List Programs
shelter_list_programs.description: Return all configured shelter event programs and their schedules.

shelter_cancel_event.label: Cancel Event Instance
shelter_cancel_event.description: Mark a specific generated event instance as cancelled (does not delete).

event_id.description: Post ID of the TEC event to cancel.

shelter_replace_event.label: Replace Event Instance
shelter_replace_event.description: Cancel a generated event and create a replacement that opens in the block editor.

event_id.description: Post ID of the TEC event to replace.
